⚡ _Teamwork makes the home work easy!_
🧹 _A clean home is a happy home (and keeps the landlord away)!_
🧼 _Many hands make light work, and clean dishes!_
🍽️ _He who does not work, neither shall he eat... or at least, they're doing the dishes!_
🙌 _Alone we can do so little; together we can keep the flat clean!_
🗑️ _Don't leave it for tomorrow, especially if it smells today!_
☕ _May your coffee be strong and your flatmate responsibilities be done!_
💪 _Great things in a flat are never done by one person; they're done by a team!_
🍕 _Teamwork is the secret that makes common people achieve uncommon results. Also, who's ordering pizza?_
🏡 _Coming together is a beginning; keeping together is progress; working together is success._
✨ _Cleanliness is next to godliness. Or at least next to a peaceful flat life._
🌟 _No one can whistle a symphony. It takes a whole orchestra to play it (and clean the kitchen after)!_
🔄 _Chores: Because adulting is 90% washing things and wondering how they got dirty again._
🧂 _A messy kitchen is a sign of a good meal. A clean kitchen is a sign of great flatmates!_
🤝 _Individual commitment to a group effort—that is what makes a team work, a company work, a society work, a flat work!_
🔑 _The strength of the team is each individual member. The strength of each member is the team._
🚿 _Clean your own mess, but help when someone else is drowning in theirs._
🥦 _Eat well, laugh often, and don't forget to take out the garbage!_
👀 _Remember: a clean sink is the easiest way to prevent a flatmate war!_
🎭 _We are all in this together. Specifically, this flat. Let's keep it tidy!_
